export default function DestCard({ pkg, onViewDetails }) { return (
{pkg.badge && {pkg.badge}}
{pkg.name}
{pkg.duration}
{/* Removed star rating, review count, description, and inclusions as requested */}
Starting from
{pkg.price}
per adult
); }
